staged_emails.subject: A note from Clarion
staged_emails.body: Hi Sarah - I noticed a pattern in Walters Law Group's recent client reviews around communication responsiveness. It's a challenge many growing firms face - feedback stays fragmented across platforms until issues become visible at the partner level. Clarion converts your public client reviews into a structured governance brief that surfaces these patterns early, with specific recommendations leadership can act on. If you're open to it, I can walk through what that would look like using a sample of your firm's public reviews.

reason: SMTP_PASS is a placeholder ('NEEDS_ZOHO_APP_PASSWORD'). Set a real Zoho app password in .env before outreach will send. Generate at: https://accounts.zoho.com/home#security > App-Specific Passwords.
